summary: Component Refactoring Regression Testing Complete: Evaluaciones.js (1405→502 lines) and Maquinaria.js (1309→325 lines) refactored into subcomponents. All functionality verified working with no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ESLint warnings in Evaluaciones.js (lines 123, 127) about missing useEffect dependencies - not blocking but should be addressed
Minor: ESLint warning in Maquinaria.js (line 79) about missing fetchMaquinaria dependency - not blocking
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Tractor de Prueba for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Component refactoring verified. Evaluaciones and Maquinaria pages fully functional. Subcomponents: EvaluacionesFilters, EvaluacionesTable, EvaluacionesForm, MaquinariaTable, MaquinariaForm, MaquinariaHistorial all working correctly.

evaluaciones_page.filters: PASSED - All 6 filters present (parcela, cultivo, proveedor, campana, contrato, estado)
evaluaciones_page.form_parcela_selection: PASSED - Parcela dropdown works, shows plantation data

maquinaria_page.kpis: PASSED - Shows Total (12), Activa (0), En Mantenimiento (0), ITV Vencida (0)
maquinaria_page.filters: PASSED - Tipo and Estado filters work correctly
maquinaria_page.filter_by_tipo: PASSED - Filtering by Tractor shows 2 items
maquinaria_page.config_fields_panel: PASSED - Opens and shows field/column toggles
maquinaria_page.historial_modal: PASSED - Opens and shows usage/maintenance data

backend_endpoints.GET /api/maquinaria/stats/resumen: PASSED - Returns stats with total, activa, por_tipo, top_uso

console_warnings: React hydration warnings about span inside option/select/tr/td - these are from development tooling (x-file-name attributes) and do not affect production
